---
title: Marmottes
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061320/marmottes_the6n2.png
description: Marmottes
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2024-02-18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061320/marmottes_the6n2.png)
